titleStmt.title: SII 19.368: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 368. (A.R. No. 689 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGUḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE GAṆĒŚA SHRINE, NEḌUṄGAḶANĀTHASVĀMI TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records a gift of twelve sheep by two shepherds Nattaṉ Kāri and Māṟaṉ Valiyaṉ for the supply of 12 nāḻi of ghee to burn a lamp during the festival days in Chittirai month in the temple of Mahādēva at Tiruneḍuṅgaḷam in Kavira-nāḍu. This is probably a record of Uttama-Chōḷa's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakesaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉaiñ
cāvatu kaviranāṭṭut tiruneṭuṅkaḷattu mahāde
varkku manṟāṭi nattaṅkāri vaitta Āṭu pa
ttum manṟāṭi māṟaṉ valiyaṉ vaitta Ā
ṭu Iraṇṭum cittirait tiruviḻāvukku tiru
viḷakku ney Aṭṭuvatāṉa ney paṉnirunā
ḻi Ippanṉiru nāḻiyum cantirātittavaṟ
Āṭṭaivaṭṭam Aṭṭuvatāka Icaiñcu koṇ
ṭa Āṭu paṉṉiraṇṭu Ivvāṭu paṉṉiraṇṭuṅ ko[ ṇ
ṭom] Ittirukkoyilluṭaiya māṭalan canti
ra cekaraṉum tampimārum māṭalan pūti pul
m māṭilaṉ naṉti vaṭukaṉum Ivvaṉaivom .
Digital edition of SII 19.368 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
